narrative:
Monroe Twp/Vil (precinct in Harrison County) has 638 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a clear Republican lean of 11.6 percentage points.
